For Traders $9.99 Flash Deal

For Traders is running an extraordinary flash promotion that gives you access to a $3,000 Instant funding account for just $9.99 using code 3KFEB. This is one of the lowest-cost entry points ever offered by any prop firm — making it an ideal option for traders who want to gain real funded experience, build their confidence, and test their strategies in a live trading environment with virtually no financial risk.

For Traders is a UAE-based proprietary trading firm known for its innovative approach to funded trading, including their Lockout Mode safety feature and multi-platform support. The firm has gained significant traction in the prop trading community by offering competitive challenge structures and genuinely disruptive promotions like this $9.99 flash deal, which demonstrates their commitment to removing barriers for aspiring funded traders.

With code 3KFEB, you receive a $3,000 Instant account — meaning no evaluation phase, no challenge to pass, just immediate access to a live simulated funded account with $3,000 in capital. At just $9.99, the risk-to-reward ratio of this offer is essentially unmatched. Lockout Mode is available on this account, so you can activate your daily loss protection and trade with the same professional guardrails available on larger accounts.

The $3,000 Instant account from For Traders operates under the firm's standard trading conditions, including their multi-platform support and UAE-based infrastructure. While $3,000 is a modest starting size, it provides a real funded environment for skill-building and the ability to earn payouts on your profits according to For Traders' standard profit split terms.

To claim this flash deal, visit For Traders via the affiliate link above, navigate to the Instant funding section, select the $3,000 tier, and apply code 3KFEB at checkout to bring your total to $9.99. This offer is strictly limited to the first 1,000 traders — once those slots are filled, the deal expires regardless of the calendar date. Act immediately to secure your spot.
